pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-005 (DQ, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4277 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.428, eu_ai_act=0.412, dcwf=0.406) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4277 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-T-005 (composite 0.4277) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4277 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Quantitative Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4277 is not a standard requirement for Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4277, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
